audit_items.proof_trace: release.c contains zero free() calls (Grep confirmed no matches). All three functions operate exclusively on compile-time macro string literals (REDIS_GIT_SHA1, REDIS_GIT_DIRTY, REDIS_VERSION, REDIS_BUILD_ID) stored in static memory; no heap allocation occurs anywhere in the file. The universal quantification forall free(p) is over an empty set, making the property vacuously and provably true.
